title: Minecraft Unbound
body:
About

Unbound is a mod pack for Minecraft Java Edition with exceptional attention to detail, high standards of quality, and top tier optimization made with the intent to reimagine Minecraft while preserving its unique style & gameplay. Inspired by Complimentary Shaders & Faithful Textures, Unbound is dedicated to be shaped by user feedback over anything else, and maintained for years to come.
